pairs._comment: Retuned after Dr. Hadley routing audit (42% agreement on v1). Median pair cosine is ~0.89 so band widened to [0.55, 0.92]. structural_mode=differs_only because reviewers accepted cue-less paraphrases (preservation_pct=0) that still preserved meaning.

negatives._comment: Hard negatives: wider band so seed-word rows without anchor cosine (neutral 0.5) are not over-penalized. Rows with llm_gate_score=0 still land in review via low confidence.

weights._comment: LLM self-score saturated on Y1; downweighted further after audit. Cosine and structural carry more of the routing decision.

routing._comment: Retuned to match human leniency: auto_min 0.70 / spot_min 0.15 achieved 82% agreement on the 50-row Hadley audit while keeping llm_gate=0 rows (conf~0.13) in review.

audit._comment: Settings for the human routing audit sample (Step 5 DoD #3).
